provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against pi. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
This is a command injection vulnerability. Never interpolate untrusted input into a shell string. Use the argv-array form with no shell:
subprocess.run(["ping", "-c", "1", hostname], check=True)
Also validate the hostname against a strict pattern at the HTTP boundary before it reaches the call.
